case_title: MATTHEW SNYDER VS. SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RUSSELL MORLEY, EMPLOYEE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SNYDER, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED APR-16-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-28-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-20-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF MATTHEW SNYDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RUSSELL T. MODBURN, SALES ADMIN MANAGER. DEFENDANT INDICATED TRUE ENTITY NAME OF JEH ENTERPRISES AS TO HIS BEST KNOWLEDGE, BUT WAS NOT CERTAIN. NO REGISTERED COMPANY WITH CALIFORNIA SECRETARY STATE FOR JEH ENTERPRISES. NO COMPANY UNDER THE NAME OF SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA ACTIVELY REGISTERED WITH SECRETARY OF STATE EITHER. DEFENDANT ALSO RETAINS RIGHT TO PROPER SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SHOULD BE AMENDED TO PROPERLY REFLECT TRUE DEFENDANT ENTITY NAME AND SERVICE OF PROCESS MUST BE COMPLETED AS WELL BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
